falsification_conditions.condition: Price closes above the 2024 August peak by 5% with a bullish engulfing candle
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Confirms a breakout from the prior bottom pattern, invalidating the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing clear bullish momentum

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 20-day average on three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Indicates extreme buying pressure contradicting the 'HOLD' signal, proving the pattern match is incorrect

falsification_conditions.condition: RSI(14) remains above 70 for three consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Signals overbought conditions that would typically precede a reversal, disproving the 'UNKNOWN' phase assumption

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
